# TmpMail

TmpMail is a free temporary email service. Create disposable email addresses instantly, no registration required. Emails self-destruct after 10 minutes.

## Use cases
- Avoid spam when signing up for services
- Protect your real email address
- Receive confirmation emails without commitment
- Test email flows during development

## Features
- Instant email generation
- Real-time inbox via WebSocket
- Multiple domains available
- File attachment support (up to 5 MB)
- Available in Spanish and English
- No IP logging, no registration required
